column2: This decision allows you to add a temporary character modifier which makes you hated by everyone who is likely to be an incompetent plotter (gluttonous, drunkard, etc) - which means you can more safely use the "auto-invite" feature.\n\nThe modifier is only active for a few days, and you are free to remove it at any time (via another mod-added decision).

The §M(ED:Plots)§Y Hated by Incompetent Plotters§! character modifier is currently active on your character. This might cause major opinion swings, so you will probably want to disable it as soon as possible.
You will be warned about the imminent expiry of this modifier in §Y30 days' time§! (15 days before it expires).

[Root.GetBestName] is currently §Rhated§! by all incompetent plotters, worldwide. They will almost certainly refuse to join [Root.GetHerHis] schemes.

§LUsage notes:
- This modifier can be toggled temporarily, so that you can use the "auto-invite plotters" feature safely: potential plotters who are likely to reveal your plot (because of their traits) will have much lower opinion of you, so they won't auto-join.
- Then, a few days later, after everyone has auto-joined, you can untick "auto-invite" and turn off this modifier - and probably no lasting harm has been done.
- NB: This will NOT prevent characters with negative plot power from joining - you might want to check the list beforehand, note any such characters, and manually remove them afterwards.§!
